buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF2D75] to-[#FF0055] text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,45,117,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-white/10 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-md
buttons.outline: border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-300

cards.glass: bg-[#0A0A0A]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300
cards.solid: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FF2D75] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF2D75] transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

header.style: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero section background (overlay with bg-black/40)

feature_background.usage: Features section background or specific feature cards

motion_and_effects.hover: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow glow for interactive elements
motion_and_effects.glow: Neon glow effect for primary buttons and active states: shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,45,117,0.5)]

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply dark mode universally (class 'dark' on html/body).
Implement the landing page with the hero background and a heavy dark overlay to ensure text contrast.
Use Framer Motion or Tailwind transitions for smooth hover states on cards and buttons.
The Dashboard UI should feel dense but luxurious. Use glassmorphism for widgets and cards.
For the AI Reply Generator, use the primary gradient for the generate button.
Ensure the Credits Remaining indicator is highly visible in the dashboard navbar (e.g., a pill with a subtle glow).
For the Review system, build a rich list view or masonry grid with reviewer avatars, star ratings (using Lucide icons in a yellow/gold color or brand pink), and a 'Generate AI Reply' button.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for robust testing.
